final_answer: To reduce the risk of getting COVID-19, individuals should avoid crowded places and maintain physical distancing of at least 1 metre from others, wear masks in public areas where community transmission is present and physical distancing is not possible, wash hands frequently with soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub, ensure good ventilation in indoor spaces, and get vaccinated to help reduce the spread of the virus and its mutations. These measures are supported by various health guidelines and evidence indicating their effectiveness in minimizing transmission risk [doc3:chunk_00016][doc3:chunk_00012][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00006].
